message:
test(mcp-types): add 68 inline property tests for MCP parameter and response types

Types are pub(super) within the mcp feature-gated module, requiring inline
tests. Covers 30 Deserialize param types (JSON→deser→field verification)
and 28 Serialize response types (construct→serialize→JSON field extraction),
plus 2 apply_tail_truncation behavioral properties. All 83 tests green.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
